---
title: "Energy futures"
description: "Robin Lovelace (2010). Energy futures. *Now Then*."
date: "2010-06-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_energy_2010"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Now Then"
doi: ""
publication-url: "http://nowthenmagazine.com/wp-content/themes/nowthen/backissues/nt27_jun10.pdf"
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
abstract: "Sustainability in Sheffield and beyond"
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Now Then
**Year:** 2010

[URL](http://nowthenmagazine.com/wp-content/themes/nowthen/backissues/nt27_jun10.pdf) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Abstract

Sustainability in Sheffield and beyond

## Citation

Robin Lovelace (2010). Energy futures. *Now Then*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{lovelace_energy_2010,
	title = {Energy futures},
	copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
	url = {http://nowthenmagazine.com/wp-content/themes/nowthen/backissues/nt27_jun10.pdf},
	abstract = {Sustainability in Sheffield and beyond},
	number = {November 2009},
	journal = {Now Then},
	author = {Lovelace, Robin},
	month = jun,
	year = {2010},
	pages = {16--17},
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
